Projects.title: Selected work
Projects.description: A few projects where design, tech and outcomes meet.

Hero.subtitle: We are
Hero.intro: 👋 Hey! We are 107 Studio. We're passionate about crafting designs that tell stories, spark emotions, and make an impact. Whether we're crafting digital experiences or creating illustrations, we pour creativity and precision into every detail.

Hero.subtitle: Services
Hero.title:
We Make
it Happen
Hero.text: We combine strategic thinking and visual craftsmanship to create digital experiences that captivate and convert.

brandIdentity.title: Brand Identity
brandIdentity.desc: We build visual identities that go beyond aesthetics — coherent brand systems that communicate essence, build trust, and stay in memory.
bullets: Logo, symbol, and icon system design
Color palette, typography, and visual language

productDesign.title: Product Design
productDesign.desc: We design people-centered digital products — intuitive interfaces that solve real problems and turn complexity into seamless experiences.
bullets: Scalable design system with reusable components
Responsive design for web and native applications

webDesign.title: Web Design & Development
webDesign.desc: We create high-performance websites that merge intentional design with modern engineering — every pixel and every line of code with purpose.
bullets: Custom web design with unique visual identity
Frontend development with React and Next.js
Technical SEO and Core Web Vitals optimization

aiAutomation.title: AI & Automation
aiAutomation.desc: We integrate artificial intelligence and automation into real business workflows — not as a buzzword, but as a tangible tool that multiplies capabilities.
bullets: Workflow automation with n8n and Zapier

marketingPerformance.title: Marketing & Performance
marketingPerformance.desc: We design and execute results-driven marketing strategies — where every campaign has clear metrics and every dollar invested has measurable return.
bullets: On-page, technical, and content SEO strategy
Paid Media campaigns (Google Ads, Meta, LinkedIn)

0.title: Discovery
0.desc: We research, listen, and analyze. We understand your business, audience, and goals to define a solid strategy before designing a single pixel.

1.title: Design & Development
1.desc: We transform strategy into visual design and functional code. We iterate with you at every phase to ensure the result exceeds expectations.

2.title: Launch & Growth
2.desc: We launch, measure, and optimize. We don't stop at deploy — we support growth with data, continuous iteration, and dedicated support.

ParallaxDivider.button: Play showreel * Play showreel * Play showreel *

testimonial_1.text: They simplified our message and built a modular website the marketing team can edit without friction.

testimonial_2.text: We came in with a fair amount of chaos and they helped us add structure. The brief became a clear guide, the brand gained coherence and the site is fast on any device.

testimonial_3.text: Clear process, direct communication, zero drama. The weekly demos kept us focused and every decision was properly documented.

testimonial_4.text: From day one they talked outcomes, not just design. Sales calls now open with 'we loved your website' and our CAC is dropping.
testimonial_4.position: Head of Growth at Bernard Systems

hera.overview: A SaaS platform of AI agents that automate 24/7 conversations and qualify leads in real time. From the marketing landing to the embeddable widget and the operations dashboard.
hera.description: We designed a coherent system across three distinct surfaces: public landing, widget embedded in a client's site, and a dashboard for teams. The technical complexity stays invisible — what remains is a tool that feels simple because it's been handled with care.

reinoxpla.overview: Corporate site for a manufacturer of professional stainless-steel furniture. Sophisticated GSAP animations, integrated quote form, and uncompromising focus on product photography.
reinoxpla.description: The brand came with a strong serif and a clear editorial voice. We designed a grid that honors that character while guiding the visitor through each segment — kitchen, bar, cold storage — without breaking visual unity.

l-de-luis.overview: Identity and landing for an urban barbershop with cinematic DNA. Black and white, bold typography, and GSAP transitions that shape the pacing of the page.
l-de-luis.description: We built the site around a single iconic archival image, using it as a narrative anchor. Every subsequent section is a counterpoint to that opening silence, sustaining an editorial pulse through the whole experience.

luminar.overview: Product landing for a suite of creative tools. A 3D hero with illuminated cubes that react to the cursor, and navigation across five themed scenes that expose each tool without a single extra word.
luminar.description: The premise was that the hero itself should demonstrate the product: instead of explaining 'light and matter', the scene does the teaching. Each slide re-lights the stage with a different focus — so the page doubles as the first demo.

flamingos.overview: A visual exploration where natural elegance meets digital craft. A low-poly flamingo rendered in real time, with scroll-driven transitions that respond to the visitor's pace.
flamingos.description: The goal was to prove a single 3D object can carry an entire narrative on its own. Every rotation, light shift and type change is orchestrated so that scrolling becomes choreography.

wire-mesh.overview: A real-time wireframe portrait rendered with WebGL shaders. A piece of technical exploration that examines how geometry can communicate presence.
wire-mesh.description: Experiment focused on probing the limits of custom shaders in the browser. The face is continuously rebuilt as a mesh of lines — fragile, expressive, computational.

solar-system.overview: A navigable solar system with planets at relative scale, physical lighting, and orbital camera controls. A sandbox for testing astronomical rendering techniques.
solar-system.description: The intent was to make a system that felt real without being a scientific replica. Textures are procedural, motions respect real ratios, and you can shift from a global view to a close-up without jumps.

there-you-are.overview: An interactive cosmic poem where language and geometry coexist. Every written word reacts to the 3D space around it.
there-you-are.description: An experiment in spatial typography: the text doesn't sit on top of an image — it lives inside the space. The piece is at once a poem, a tech demo and a small navigable universe.

flock.overview: A generative 3D cube landscape. Every visit reconstructs a different topography from procedural noise and composition rules.
flock.description: A study on how much a world made entirely of cubes can suggest. No textures, no assets — only primitive geometry, light, and algorithmic composition.

challenge.title: Challenge
challenge.intro: Every project starts with a unique set of constraints — tight timelines, evolving requirements, or the need to stand out in a saturated market.
challenge.body: Our role was to distill complexity into clarity: understand the core problem, align stakeholders around a shared vision, and define a path that balances ambition with feasibility.

solution.title: Solution
solution.intro: We approached the project with a research-first mindset — mapping user needs, auditing the competitive landscape, and identifying the highest-impact opportunities.
solution.body: From there, we moved into iterative design and development sprints, validating decisions early and shipping with precision. The result: a product that feels intentional in every detail.

Metadata.title: 107 Studio | Creative Digital Agency
Metadata.description: Software development and digital design studio. We build high-impact websites and custom applications.
